title: archive — a session the user has set aside
description: A CONTAINED kind: like summary, this is workspace-owned state about a bound session (the session itself lives read-only in ~/.claude, so 'archived' cannot live on it). Presence of the record IS the archived state — one per archived session, keyed by the session uuid; unarchiving deletes it. Written only by tools/archive_session.py.

id.description: = session_id. One archive record per session; its existence means archived.

archived_at.description: ISO local time it was archived.
